title: urera aurantiaca var. scandens
intro: Urera aurantiaca var. scandens, also known as the climbing nettle, is a variety of the Urera aurantiaca plant that belongs to the family Urticaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Urera aurantiaca var. scandens include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, eczema, and digestive issues.
